propositions: The existing test uses inspect.getsource to assert tokens like sign_manifest, transition, reopen are absent, making it a fragile change-detector that exercises no runtime behavior.
Replace the source-token test with a behavioral purity-contract test running the real floor over the gold fixture.
Assert findings are conserved: the finding id set across advisory ∪ dropped is identical before and after the floor runs.
Assert the floor adds no signature/attestation/attestations key and no new attestation kind, only dropped and coverage narrowing.
Assert the floor does not mutate its cmap input or finding content dicts, verified against deep copies.
Retain the attest._MANIFEST_PREFIX == 'plan-review' artifact-contract invariant and remove all inspect.getsource token-absence assertions.
